title: Warhammer: Inquisitor
description: Warhammer Inquisitor is a first-person shooter horror game set in the Warhammer 40k universe. A passion project I picked up to further my understanding of Unreal and its new Niagara systems. Currently still in the asset creation phase I would be excited to have something presentable in 2021 if time allows.

title: Dungeon Crawler
description: The goal of Dungeon Crawler was to make a quick simulator for World of Warcraft's dungeon design. The idea being you can have a greater data set and feedback from testing a dungeon in simulations. Reducing playtesting time to just when you need it. This project had a very high level of scope and I realize I wouldn't have the time to dedicate much to it but it was very insightful in providing me with ideas for GUIs for game testing. Examples are shown in the agro range, line of sight, and Simple AI systems.

title: Unreal Cinematics Practice
description: This was a quick project to better understand Sequencer and Unreal's new water system. Done over the course of 2 weekends the project was very simple. Half of my work went into retopologizing the hero asset; the skull. Done manually in Maya and baked in Zbrush. Overall the project came out fine. If I had more time I would have figured out how to get transparency shaders to work with the water shader, so the sprite works underwater.

title: Detective
description: InDesign detective game project featuring Mona Lisa themed interaction and animated presentation work.

title: Table Flipper
description: 3D table-flipping arcade game built in Unity. Responsible for 3D assets, lighting, and game logic.

title: Escape From Editor
description: Unreal Engine mech combat game. Built and rigged the mech character, designed interior levels with lighting, and authored environmental storytelling through prop placement.

title: South Park Platformer
description: Pixel art platformer built as a personal project. Custom sprite art, character animation, and game logic.

title: Time Travelers DropBox
description: Competitive card game design built around time-traveling characters and item cards. The project focused on readable card layout, iconography, and tabletop presentation.

title: A Boy and His Beard
description: Twin-stick beat 'em up prototype with animated combat and character-driven presentation. The project explored quick readability for attacks, movement, and enemy reactions.

title: Play Two Heroes
description: Play Two Heroes is a mod that takes inspiration from Marvel Vs Capcom 2 and utilizes a hero switch mechanic. Players leverage a broader ability toolkit by switching between two selected heroes, creating more solutions to problems. Six core systems coded: crowd-control prevention, ultimate transfer, health percentage carry-over, switch cooldowns, momentum retention, and tiered cooldown adjustments. Notable edge cases handled include Baby D.Va's 30-second lockout and a visual indicator for cloaked Sombra. Officially acknowledged by Jeff Kaplan (Blizzard) — ranked 11th overall most-played mod by duration, 2nd highest average player retention.

title: Junkenstein's New Boss Mod
description: A twist on Junkenstein's Revenge providing new powerful enemies through redesigned hero mechanics. Reaper teleports and hacks on ultimate using line-of-sight detection. Roadhog pulls enemies toward him on ultimate with stacking AOE damage. Symmetra spawns sentry turrets every 9 seconds. Junkrat's RIP-tires lack AI movement — Junkenstein moves to the player instead. Mercy given a gun with no forced Valkyrie mode.

title: Hearthtone Concepts
description: Concept art and card design for a Hearthstone-inspired card game. Dark atmospheric illustration and creature card design.

title: The Spare
description: 3D animated title sequence — treehouse environment with stylized lighting.

title: ThriveVR
description: Physical therapy VR game and promotional prototype work. Built around approachable motion, robot character presentation, and readable VR interactions.

title: Low Fruit
description: Still life 3D render — mango, game controller, rose, and aged book. Lighting and texturing study in Maya.

title: Character Rig
description: Stylized character rig built in Maya. Full-body IK/FK control rig with facial controls.

title: Hanamikoji
description: Physical card game design and production. Designed, printed, and played.

title: Cabin Lighting Study
description: Maya exterior render — cabin with windmill, tree, and natural lighting study.
